bild_datei.label: Bilddatei
bild_datei.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6822e973c07d98c861cb2db6/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

bild_titel.label: Titel des Bildes
bild_titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bild_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
bild_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

bild_aufnahmedatum.label: Aufnahmedatum und -zeit
bild_aufnahmedatum.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

bild_standort.label: Aufnahmeort
bild_standort.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Standorte' with the id `6822e9709bf15c1e2a8dca33` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6822e9709bf15c1e2a8dca33/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

standort_name.label: Name des Standorts
standort_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

standort_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
standort_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

standort_position.label: Geografische Position
standort_position.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.
